hero.sub: Deterministic Oracle engine. Multi-signal detection. Exposure quantified in dollars. What your dashboards don't show, ValuGuard detects.
problem.label: SILENT EXPOSURE
problem.source: Based on median findings across 50-500 employee companies. Source: Flexera, Zylo, Gartner 2024-25.
detect.label: MULTI-SIGNAL DETECTION
detect.title: 5 convergent signals. Deterministic engine. Zero speculation.
detect.d1: BFR deviation from structural norms. Early indicator of treasury tension.
detect.d2: Burn rate trajectory analysis. Detects unsustainable consumption patterns.
detect.d3: Ratio of short-term obligations to available liquidity. Threshold-based alert.
detect.d4: Structural weakness in asset/liability composition. Multi-period analysis.
detect.d5: Convergent deterioration across multiple indicators. Pattern, not noise.
detect.d6: Final output: exposure in currency, corrective window in days, dominant cause isolated.

faq.label: FREQUENTLY ASKED
faq.title: The real questions. Direct answers.
faq.q1: How does the Oracle engine work?
faq.a1: Deterministic system. Statistical distance between your profile and tension thresholds. Five simultaneous signals. Mathematical, reproducible, verifiable result. No neural networks.
faq.a2: Financial statements and income statements from the last 3 fiscal years. No banking data. No API access. Local processing, cryptographic signature.
faq.q3: What does the corrective protocol include?
faq.a3: Priority corrective levers, estimated impact, sequenced actions. Not a passive report — a quantified execution order with arbitrations ranked by urgency.
faq.a4: Ed25519 signatures on every attestation. Sovereign European environment. No third parties. No external LLM. AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit.
faq.q5: What if no tension is detected?
faq.a5: Result with low or zero exposure. That's a valid result — confirmation that stress signals are absent. No additional charge.
faq.a6: Cost of half a day of consulting. Quantified result in 48h, not a subjective opinion. If detected exposure is $100,000, the ratio speaks for itself.
cta.urgency: EXPOSURE DOES NOT DECREASE BY WAITING
cta.sub: Receive your exposure mapping in 48 hours. Quantified result. Corrective protocol included. No commitment.
footer.desc: Financial exposure detection system. Deterministic quantification. Integrated corrective protocol.
method.subtitle: A deterministic, explainable, and verifiable engine. We publish our thresholds, formulas, and limitations.
method.cta.text: Test this methodology on your own data.
method.s1.label: 01 — SHADOW AI INFERENCE
method.s1.title: Detect redundancy without accessing your systems.
method.s1.p1c: : each tool maps to a functional category. Excess tools beyond the optimal threshold trigger redundancy cost weighted by √(N/50).
method.s1.threshnote: Above threshold = billable redundancy. Zylo 2024 + Flexera 2024.
method.s2.label: 02 — THE ENTROPY EQUATION
method.s2.desc: κ(N) models Brooks' Law for IT spend: coordination cost grows at
method.s2.descc: . The logarithm captures natural stabilization — 500 employees is not 10x more chaotic than 50.
method.entropy.zero: Compact org (≤50). Entropy is zero — one person governs all purchases.
method.entropy.low: Low entropy. Coordination manageable, but duplicates appear at team boundaries.
method.entropy.mod: Moderate entropy. Shadow IT and orphan licenses increasing. Monitoring recommended.
method.entropy.high: High entropy. Leaks near-inevitable without active FinOps governance. Audit urgent.
method.s3.label: 03 — ZERO-KNOWLEDGE PROTOCOL
method.s3.title: Your systems stay untouched.
method.zk.trustsub: Zero-Knowledge is architectural, not a limitation.
method.s4.label: 04 — FOUR-PHASE PROCESS
method.s4.title: From CSV to board report in 48 hours.
method.zk.step1d: Download CSVs from billing tools. You control what leaves.
method.zk.step2d: Encrypted TLS 1.3. Files never touch human hands.
method.zk.step3d: 8 detectors in isolated container. No human reads raw files.
method.zk.step4d: Structured report with dollar-valued recovery actions.
method.s5.label: 05 — 12-TYPE LEAK TAXONOMY
method.s5.title: Every lost dollar has a name, a type, and a recovery path.
method.s5.source: Covers 95%+ of SaaS/Cloud/AI losses. Sources: Flexera 2024, Zylo 2024, Gartner 2025.
method.leak.1d: Seats paid for departed or idle employees (90+ days).
method.leak.2d: Multiple tools solving the same function across teams.
method.s6.label: 06 — WHAT V1 DOES NOT DO
method.s6.title: Honesty over marketing.
method.noml.label: WHY NO ML IN V1?
method.noml.3: Zero hallucination — no AI false positives
vault.subtitle: Secure by architecture, not by promise. We publish our controls, our sub-processors, and our limitations. Trust is earned, not claimed.
vault.s1.label: 01 — ZERO-KNOWLEDGE AUDIT PROTOCOL
vault.s1.title: We analyze your spend without seeing your data.
vault.s1.desc: Unlike tools that require OAuth access to your SaaS accounts or install agents on your network, Valuguard operates exclusively on
vault.s1.descc: . No credentials. No API connections. No agents. Your attack surface stays identical before and after the audit.
vault.zk.step1d: Download CSV/XLSX from your billing tools. You control exactly what data leaves your systems.
vault.zk.step2d: Encrypted TLS 1.3 upload to our vault. Files never touch our team's machines — automated pipeline only.
vault.zk.step3d: Deterministic rule engine processes data in an isolated container. No human reads your raw files.
vault.zk.step4d: Structured report with anomalies, scores, and recommendations. Raw data purged within 30 days.
vault.zk.trustsub: The Zero-Knowledge protocol is an architectural choice, not a limitation. Your security posture remains unchanged.
vault.commit.1.title: AES-256 Encryption
vault.commit.1.desc: All data encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). Keys managed by AWS KMS with automatic rotation.
vault.commit.2.title: 30-Day Auto-Purge
vault.commit.2.desc: Raw uploaded files are automatically deleted 30 days after processing. Full deletion on request within 72 hours.
vault.commit.3.title: Row-Level Security
vault.commit.3.desc: Every database query is filtered by organization. No user can access another organization's data, even with a valid session.
vault.commit.4.title: Complete Audit Trail
vault.commit.4.desc: Every data access, export, and modification is logged. Audit logs exportable on demand for your compliance team.
vault.commit.5.title: US Data Residency
vault.commit.5.desc: All data stored in AWS us-east-1 (Virginia). No data leaves US jurisdiction. No international transfers.
vault.commit.6.title: Dedicated DPO
vault.commit.6.desc: security@valuguard.com. Response within 48 hours. Processing records and sub-processor list available on request.
vault.s2.label: 02 — DATA FLOW ARCHITECTURE
vault.s2.title: From upload to report — every step encrypted.
vault.s3.label: 03 — SUB-PROCESSORS
vault.s3.title: Full transparency on who handles what.
vault.s4.label: 04 — WHAT WE DON'T HAVE YET
vault.s4.title: Honesty over marketing.
vault.s4.desc: We list our limitations upfront. Every item below is on our roadmap with a target date.
vault.hon.why.title: Why we publish this list
vault.hon.why.desc: Any vendor that claims SOC2 without proof is a red flag. We show you exactly where we are and where we're headed. Trust is built on verified controls, not badge graphics.
vault.s5.label: 05 — SECURITY FAQ
vault.s5.title: The real questions. Direct answers.
vault.faq.q1: What data do you need for an audit?
vault.faq.a1: Billing exports (CSV/XLSX), license inventories, and optionally vendor invoices. We never need login credentials, API keys, OAuth access, or any connection to your production systems.
vault.faq.q2: Who can access my data inside Valuguard?
vault.faq.a2: Only the automated analysis engine processes your raw data. The assigned analyst reviews the structured output (anomalies, scores) — never the source files. All access is logged.
vault.faq.a3: We are SOC2 Type II audit-ready with all controls in place: encryption at rest/transit, RLS, audit logging, access controls, and 30-day auto-purge. Formal certification is in progress (target: Q3 2026). We list our actual controls rather than claiming certifications we don't yet hold.
vault.faq.q4: Can I delete my data before the 30-day window?
vault.faq.a4: Yes. Request deletion at security@valuguard.com and all data (raw files, processed results, reports) is permanently removed within 72 hours. You'll receive a deletion confirmation.
vault.faq.q5: What happens if there's a data breach?
vault.faq.a5: Our incident response protocol requires notification within 72 hours per US state breach notification laws. All data is encrypted at rest, so even in the unlikely event of unauthorized access, the data is unreadable without KMS keys.
vault.cta.sub: Our security team responds within 48 hours. We'll walk through our architecture, controls, and compliance roadmap.
